textByHash.01c4e689290671ac2974dcb93c6bfb4e6ff08348: Now you see, I've tried honour before. Decided it wasn't for me. Honour matters not if you're dead. I intend to keep living.
textByHash.0246125f603872f7e0ed57aa00bfcba9509006b9: Like I said, we suffered heavy losses in the war. We needed a way to quickly restore our numbers. Vampyrification was the answer. Your father was the first of many to go through the process.
textByHash.03fea00925d397d46ffe638db6df55cc13401cbe: Indeed you do. Not a bad weapon by any means, but not ideal for taking on Lowerniel. He'll snap it in two before you even have a chance to use it.
textByHash.06924ed7ee43bc6f128edbac5244c5248bd74031: If I'm not mistaken, which I'm generally not, you made that weapon using research from the Haemalchemy Laboratory.
textByHash.0774b83ab3cb3f991ad8b4856bf94b1756a1649c: Something has to change, or we're doomed.
textByHash.0a73d6c0cdcd3af4a6355450f781767402c83d78: Did you not know? here isn't just responsible for killing Ranis. He also killed our younger brother, Draynor.
textByHash.0a9e9ef007c090abddd90f615433d75e771f96b9: You need to get this door open. From what I can tell, you'll need to ensure that the total value of each row and column on the lock matches the number at the end.
textByHash.0b5cd24db4d202a61233def99516e1634e2e5039: Ah, but you are far from ordinary, aren't you Safalaan? Tell me, how much do you remember of your childhood?
textByHash.0caa5106dcc5f425ad64fa6d2634ae2495f044e5: My brother was a great conqueror, make no mistake. But he is a poor ruler. And now, thanks to him, our society is collapsing.
textByHash.0ff8d442ca0173e7bb545d1c1ba3cfae4601f814: Yes, yes. Wonderful to see you. Shall we get on with things?
textByHash.11f5537d85d2e38d3acae19dd546a6ce26fc41f7: Well... not quite. While not perfect, the work you've already done has potential. I see no need to completely discard it.
textByHash.1221a0c2daba709e804ae2e7232741678b863fcd: It's relevant because while all of this happens, our great leader remains absent. Lowerniel never liked to show his face, but these days it's as if he doesn't even exist. He spends months in his chambers, refusing to see anyone.
textByHash.1346e439fdb796a38bb7836176d8bf11a7e6beff: To the south east of Meiyerditch, there's an old graveyard. The Icyene Graveyard, we call it. Gather the Myreque, every member, and meet me there. That is where I will present my proposal.
textByHash.139a2aff753a8d10cde31e76bf70cc69eb245659: Every day that goes by, the number of humans in Morytania decreases. Yet while this happens, our population continues to grow. Unsurprisingly, we no longer have enough blood to go around.
textByHash.142ecd10b31025d817df226793349f9f71dd6525: No. After that, I'm afraid I don't know what happened to your mother. No one ever saw her again. Only Lowerniel himself knows her fate.
textByHash.161167227725cbd0c8a334e2bb600181e0079992: Once Lowerniel is dead, I will teleport you all back here again. I will then announce his death to my kind and take his place as the ruler of Morytania.
textByHash.162e08ca26b7732733f7435a319ba2dd07029f4c: You're back. Do you have the logs?
textByHash.17aef4b25e23dff45714b8a95ee8b762ad2e2013: That said, I do suspect it might have more secrets for us to discover.
textByHash.184f771f8d7ab789e918042b3d9918cd1d7cdc04: I think we use this as an opportunity to deal with two issues in one. Damien Leucurte has become a problem that needs to be resolved. He is also a noble, albeit a lesser one.
textByHash.186587b53449d94c1e6cdccc762e8fe2fb663dd0: Why, with these blood tithes you're really spoiling us!
textByHash.19255eed8b0d032e24795f111d53fcec39fcfa74: Well it is true. Now, if you'll excuse me, I'd best be getting inside.
textByHash.19ab6cc02a7a7bbbd188e7a79c51d6573f036f82: Now, luckily for us, my kind have some shapeshifting abilities. Many vampyres, such as myself, prefer to take on a human form. That means you should be able to fit in... with the right outfit of course.
textByHash.1a6a8b8df6308c850b6dfbed413d5d54ef39fc63: I have many supporters amongst the vampyres of Darkmeyer. Your small group against all of us? The fight would be brief.
textByHash.1bd74f5e608e8cba5c66bf8f9f92b01af958eca9: From here, I will teleport our group to the Darkmeyer Arboretum. There, we will join with some vyres loyal to me.
textByHash.1c47032819d27a8672cc82aaaa04955f21fac049: I just wasn't convinced you'd be able to do the job. It seems I was right to be cautious.
textByHash.1c56d96aa7d7a0467b03ddce3a8dd7e54b5e241d: Alone, you have no hope of ever getting close to Lowerniel. Now, I on the otherhand, can get you right into his chambers at Castle Drakan.
textByHash.1e7a89a66c9cf79b4f9a1bdce73d5ee4105025f4: Oh dear Veliaf, you misunderstand. The smell of my blood will be far too recognisable to work. We need someone a bit more obscure.
textByHash.234b3a6df0b1d8828e6e526b67cb96b8b1dcaaf1: The powers of an icyene, yes.
textByHash.2456f62c69b14abaf1f20102c71bae7180d7c829: Wonderful. Now we're getting somewhere. With that disguise, you should be ready to enter Darkmeyer.
textByHash.24cce39e9c92cdaedc5a615684d21fb4c9132d6c: Indeed. Of course, Lowerniel's long absences mean that a lot of research was already complete before the laboratory was shut down. Hence how you were able to use it against Ranis.
textByHash.25289b5fad58108d4f6fcc81d30c0b1cdaca16a1: Morytania would become a land of peace and prosperity, with humans and vampyres living side by side.
textByHash.2567a6c176c9ed9c435801953fb4a723cba22201: Oh... no, no, no. A vyrewatch will not do. We want you to blend in with the nobles. That means we need the blood of a noble.
textByHash.270f664f2c7b5dba7b569d50438d875061f52401: Mmm, delicious! Well, it's been lovely as usual, Vanstrom.
textByHash.28db2afacaead6e7b7ae39531a014f682c0e4083: Yes. If you are able to find further research notes, I suspect we'll find a way to upgrade that weapon of yours.
textByHash.2902353d3eb6520711728efef5c1d03f7078b63d: Long ago, the land of Morytania was known as Hallowvale and it was ruled over by a race of Saradominists called the icyene.
textByHash.29a50966963aaf1b79bcc5eb233274a2776d1eb8: Besides, up until now, why would any human even consider entering Darkmeyer? Perhaps you hadn't noticed, my kind is not known for treating humans well.
textByHash.29e0013099234691326eeafd8497c77eba6a9f36: Why wouldn't I? He's an awful leader. My kind are slowly starving to death thanks to overpopulation, but he doesn't even seem to have noticed.
textByHash.2b0373b1024f35ef6d7c4caa09e0d27007f6a3eb: I never said it would be easy. I don't expect us to kill my brother and then have a big party. It will be work, but given time, that work will pay off.
textByHash.2c133cbe178fe514b45f95d1eebe4a39741e5139: Ah yes, , the great vampyre slayer. I would thank you, were it not for the fact that his funeral was such a dull affair.
textByHash.2d6709b1aad3abf0a38fd44a1618f67f0c58a288: Excellent, glad we understand one another. I will await you at the graveyard.
textByHash.2f0d632b7b5a6c059347575b075f1dceed8f8a69: If you want any hope of defeating my brother, you'll need the proper weaponry.
textByHash.3030c6870abc01c80ab4d2b727a106e280348e57: It should be big enough for you to squeeze through, as long as you haven't recently eaten an excess of cakes.
textByHash.30eb4d7dc9fbe072883ef028b89b63f173c27beb: The name 'Hallow'. Do you know where it comes from?
textByHash.31503ea41baf89778f87994f1c85118c4eee3c9d: Queen Efaritay was a renowned botanist. She used this to her advantage many times during the war, breeding all kinds of plant life to use against us.
textByHash.3204ccf9f509c9650409701b3a549aa94a8f2f1e: Oh Veliaf my dear, If I'd wanted you dead I'd have done it a long time ago.
textByHash.32161f747e190b9f7803a1a5ff54de5666938ba2: Oh lighten up would you. No sense of humour at all.
textByHash.3671db0ba90e4a8accac37dcb34989f5ecd56a7b: I'm impressed Veliaf. I did fear you'd go and do something silly.
textByHash.37d2ec078b4a0348f48609afb7e7eb0b70cf444d: You need to kill Damien Leucurte and use his blood to scent your disguise. Run along now.
textByHash.3b29e281790abd29c07c8d66b51353d26f4e216c: Ha, ha, ha. Vanstrom, you do make me laugh.
textByHash.3b39dac0e9be4984fa63932ae1bdb59c6e1d1f24: Lowerniel turned him into a vampyre, not I.
textByHash.3b40470d68ac849dd4cf2bfee745bae0dec89b3b: Out there, in your city, they're starving. There's not enough blood to go around and their great leader is unwilling to provide a solution.
textByHash.3c867eb4cf001d316bebeed45f9409d358b1516a: Ah yes, the great 'Count' Draynor. He loved his stupid titles. He was weak even before he got trapped on the wrong side of the Salve. A coward as well.
textByHash.3c874542919e60954f73fe0cd60d409931f3610b: The war for this land was long and bloody. We were winning, but with heavy losses. Lowerniel didn't mind. He was a hunter and a warrior. In his eyes, there was no death more noble than one in battle.
textByHash.444dd970838acdb11c52f7c16db2ac55ffd621c1: Anyway, I don't know much of the laboratory myself. It was Ranis that had it set up. Lowerniel wasn't very happy when he found out.
textByHash.45135d264580bf42ba68ce25ee6d7d2f9b8e27ea: Ah, and there I was thinking we were starting to become friends. Fine. I'm here to make you an offer. A once in a lifetime offer.
textByHash.46a6fbfa6700afef8f2a746a2b23d1b13ce998c9: One of these plants was the Blisterwood tree. The icyene used the sap of this tree to create poisons that were deadly to vampyres.
textByHash.4751699dc58c1aebd73e6facae6333c1b797ae26: Oh on the contrary, the death of Ranis was just what we needed.
textByHash.4b74283abf042aee2c3321ac43b7ec01080031be: Good, good. Once you are ready, let me know and we will begin.
textByHash.4bee7428d546686261419d875bbafa38ab0b4fc3: If I were to give the order, I could have the heads of every member of the Myreque mounted above the gates of Castle Drakan before the day is out.
textByHash.4eb95d1bb387a6a415c6dd05f307dd0939959596: You don't. But Castle Drakan is impenetrable. You'll never get inside on your own, and Lowerniel clearly has no intention of coming out. This is your only option.
textByHash.4faf0d9845ce4d95d9208e21d5e17200ab9e2c11: Well, the research you recovered has confirmed something I have long suspected.
textByHash.508e3bdf3b239a7b3ebb0b4e09909797acdce80d: Almost, but not quite. I know of a small weakness in the southern wall. A crack, in sector six of Meiyerditch, just north of the daeyalt mine.
textByHash.50e4747078ad8b0c70d3b2fd55f7fd6a34f8638a: Now, whatever happens, you must not let your true identity be exposed. If a member of the Myreque was found in Darkmeyer, the entire city would be locked down.
textByHash.5254cf09e6325b9262afb8c3952854595986aa2c: But we really have to get on.
textByHash.544c7778edbf267ec194b49321cc8b32ba8b7a36: I expect you to see many things you consider undesirable while in Darkmeyer, especially where your kind are concerned.
textByHash.54e5a89f48331d785113e1186d8a16d594bdc3bd: Would you actually believe me if I did? To you, my words are just that, words. Inside this mausoleum lies something far more reliable, proof.
textByHash.554d582468287a92391d7fb2347e5b4a28b5cd16: Incidentally, should you fail to attend...
textByHash.5714963a7ce6143c9b76fbe94e21bb8bba81f987: I can only assume he didn't like what they were doing there.
textByHash.581a8a45d34d76c41b4f18bcb37b7657b76d22c3: There was no love between Ranis and I. You did us a favour when you got rid of him.
textByHash.584d2b8016154b73899ebfec549fc13a63d07653: You worry too much. Safalaan is a big boy.
textByHash.591293da37b2088ee43543c185e52133a8fbfdea: This graveyard is no normal graveyard. It was once the private graveyard of the Hallow family. Every member of the royal family was buried here.
textByHash.5ad756a8141541cbb05bc9dd2c4bbc2b5cd6964b: As for the second, I think it's obvious why Lowerniel wanted to put a stop to that. Just ask Ranis why that research maybe wasn't overly wise.
textByHash.5d90385b0b73fa9336b2998b024650d6088fbac9: Wonderful. Now, as mentioned earlier, we will need to scent this disguise. My kind have a keen sense of smell and will quickly notice an imposter if they don't smell right.
textByHash.6094798c2090c1a42cd243c13daafa086ab4a52d: Tell me, have you worked out why this arrangement exists?
textByHash.60af7fa1abb586c30594ff04795d9c758f3ec938: Lowerniel is far more powerful than Ranis was. If you want to defeat him, you should take my advice.
textByHash.61a5ed4aa8837fc8f42ff97449e99da74c99a284: You're meant to be working with Polmafi to create a suitable disguise. Now, off you go.
textByHash.62bb8305a9f55c74b8b537f117648c460a2b9050: Essentially. The first might seem to benefit Lowerniel, but when you look deeper you can see why he wasn't a fan.
textByHash.6413284c5a8861067814ae2085562a3d8cc0297d: Good. Here's what's going to happen.
textByHash.6671de29e627580aa194fc4a9e8ad48d2b30309d: Yes, you. Join me by the large mausoleum at the back of the graveyard. There is something we need to discuss.
textByHash.6755c1cca8708def5adf207c028d67449582407a: No. You need to tell your companions about Safalaan's decision. Now, get going.
textByHash.69327a8d08428a5526211c543357a6b39092fd2c: Inside, I believe you will find the truth that you've spent your whole life searching for.
textByHash.698155f94743b9e27b304b85da635e2a9fb18f37: There was once a time where humans and vampyres lived together in a great empire. Under my rule, I would see us return to that way of life.
textByHash.6a8ca06b7622131ffcca66fe11065e330eb8d96c: We will take your group to Castle Drakan as our prisoners. Once inside, my vyres will ensure no one enters while we deal with my brother.
textByHash.6ad3fae9180d3dca5e48bd0b922811363cb22b47: Oh, it's probably also worth mentioning that I can't afford any loose ends. If you decline, I would expect you to leave Morytania immediately.
textByHash.6af5d4c1971f83a0f8508e8c0d360321504a7709: Blood of course. The blood of a vyre.
textByHash.6d81a50ee4195d31ca7930e926bc4937eb8c6784: Ah yes, the plan itself. You will pose as my prisoners and I shall escort you to Castle Drakan. Your capture is something that even Lowerniel will be unable to ignore.
textByHash.6f05d2716d72d3ad4bee7f9ad1d11247cedff700: Of course. The lords and ladies of Darkmeyer won't go interacting with any old rabble.
textByHash.6ff6337caaceb246687d5a2525e741841cea26dd: For our kind to be less reliant on humans would be a fundamental change to our society. History has told us that leaders generally don't survive such a transition.
textByHash.709a92ce22758ea0f2ddaade5948623656d2d027: Instead, I suggest we use wood from the Blisterwood tree to enhance the weapons you already have. When combined with the wood, I imagine that flail of yours will be quite effective.
textByHash.70ab3b1a8f726d29dda75aedc1fcfda2e9d3a347: I know many things about Safalaan. It's why we are here, in fact. But please, go on.
textByHash.7128762cd22be6b4be9dbd3ee8f258b486ebc5a8: Vanstrom. I am here with a gift for my brother.
textByHash.7143af36a0c4d8d99cc51294f107a7f81ec33848: Good name, but not really his style I'm afraid.
textByHash.723527ecda3a512e296485ebebbab4c5d40bbd4f: Really now? Do you think I have any intention of touching a tree that can kill vampyres? No. You will need to recover the wood yourself.
textByHash.726430a7421be77c95160542bf108b799bd350bb: A bit close? You nearly blew everything with your little run in with Vanstrom. It was a good job I had Sarius keep an eye on you.
textByHash.73f97924bab211d5b8eb210580b12868440f8e85: Well don't take too long. Return once you are ready.
textByHash.740ac827c446a1889115582d49dd70fda1820fac: I'm sorry Safalaan, but it is true. You are the half- human, half-icyene son of Queen Efaritay Hallow.
textByHash.754b3db6098303ea4012a1dbfe230f676d600e67: , who was it that helped you find that laboratory?
textByHash.76dca523ddb8f78ea51a61fcd1d7e1435ed28532: From there, we will start to build our new kingdom, together.
textByHash.78b1f77188ba8f187dc93ae553fa7180ad7b4537: You have been gone too long, brother. While you spend your days hidden away, lamenting about that stupid rock, our kind suffer.
textByHash.79be06e8a220c6e9921d215b4c7da60a7527008a: Well off you go then. You'll need it before we go any further.
textByHash.7cb2c04b8fb4b17baa9a3023f319deb5c08ac049: You need to infiltrate Darkmeyer and recover eight logs from the Blisterwood tree. Now, off you go.
textByHash.7ddec7218a814d0d218a6e3b7f0365bc4d6be63f: I realise it's a lot to take in.
textByHash.7e61ef41542c4e248d0b43d9df6e675d56ef070c: In some ways, I think Lowerniel was a bit disappointed the fighting was over. The pair were still greatly rewarded, however. Verzik ended up getting Efaritay's castle. It was quite the boon for her.
textByHash.80174d2afb3281c44acc38b0660c85902b8ebe90: To stay would have dire consequences for your life expectancy.
textByHash.80febb45796c96c1e4ed74209204912a4ebf1f62: Am I? So if I were to head to the Burgh de Rott inn and go down into the basement, what would I find?
textByHash.81721ec7c60bda98226dc5fa7cd7af1f4173a53e: While you may be tempted to get involved, don't. Stay in character no matter what.
textByHash.873fb508811843544ad8aa47f72a271fde65255d: However, I've always suspected the tree might have other uses. Clearly the researchers in the Haemalchemy Laboratory thought the same.
textByHash.87bb25e30125c3be19aa7709f954fa2af3558178: A lie, I'm afraid. I know exactly how many of you there are. And that number isn't as big as you'd like to pretend.
textByHash.87f0f1775d87c81a361247dd1018362e3d52985e: Good, good! You seem to be well in control.
textByHash.89fa31bc941aa486e97eeda5406fb9f80ce7d466: Well well, the vampyre slayer returns. Two of my brothers, now Damien as well. Quite the body count you're amassing.
textByHash.8a5931dc8304424533824f25a0929cf7ac6507c7: Everything I have told you is the truth. Only you can decide if you want to believe it.
textByHash.8adc1f5f1dab2f6dfb748ae6cf3ad780b3b8dce6: Is that such a bad thing? Your people would consider you heroes. You'd be the ones to finally kill Lowerniel Drakan.
textByHash.8e25e50ba0a1f0aad5e1ffabb793e96f21ea09b9: Come now, don't be so hasty. You should at least think things over. While you do, I would appreciate a private chat with Safalaan.
textByHash.8edcbbc61113ac40f7a7acd397ecb14d3afdabe4: It seems that the bark of the Blisterwood tree can be used to create weapons that are deadly to my kind.
textByHash.9249e3fd19b6098f884c2e002987bfeca57b2db7: Now I won't deny, you've not done a bad job. Killing Ranis was no small achievement, but you managed it all the same.
textByHash.94c9847944065892a047b2ac3c443b7bdb7fb972: Wonderful. It's an interesting lock. The icyene always were devious. From what I can tell, you'll need to ensure that the total value of each row and column matches the number at the end.
textByHash.9677111be5ef78717d183a4379100684a9145b38: I am no fool. I am all too aware of my own weaknesses and how you could exploit them. When we take on Lowerniel, I don't intend to be alone.
textByHash.9a803531e5dc076665d4df0700dead2d6f0e42f7: Fine. Conversing with you is a chore, anyway.
textByHash.9bfe7b801a5cc2cdb0911fc4371e11e1aa629fa0: When she was still in power, the ruler of Hallowvale, Queen Efaritay Hallow, had this mausoleum built. It was constructed to one day house her and her human husband, King Ascertes Hallow.
textByHash.9c3128203c817ca9fda3d3533033005de1aaf25c: Do you know of Verzik Vitur?
textByHash.9d10749a226b54768cacddd90258aaa979c12989: I negotiated with them. Convinced them that I was on their side. After that, bringing them in was trivial.
textByHash.a0c971dd0e12609d5c008b2d678edfd8f8401fe9: Efaritay surrendered that same day. She walked into Lowerniel's camp, alone, and willingly handed herself in. I guess she had hoped that Lowerniel would free your father in exchange for her.
textByHash.a3478b5da7b16bef9f0497970e479e4c5be59f7c: Safalaan Hallow. Interesting name, isn't it?
textByHash.a4b69f7095d8b9d44dcb356b0e3ec23f4721979b: So be it. You should inform the rest of your group.
textByHash.a4e3e738c293f93840e493c81e123ca1f69f9958: Well noted. We'll need to unlock it.
textByHash.a5b33eaeb4712c2ea152099d847e4e0b84619f63: Not really. It is the vampyre way. There was once a time when things were far more savage. Back on our homeworld, new clan leaders were selected during a festival known as the Night of the Blood Moon.
textByHash.a805ec9aadecc6e7d56ce12217beae55c8b082a9: You'll need to get to Efaritay's Arboretum in the middle of the city. The city architects gave it facelift to help it blend in, but it's still impossible to miss.
textByHash.a88b66817260ba26bd13f0475ef64db7bf2146ec: Well run along then. We need eight logs from the blisterwood tree.
textByHash.abb15537f167bd87ced60445223bf9b4b1d44009: You're meant to be searching the Haemalchemy Laboratory for more research. Run along now.
textByHash.ac4f14269430c4c1f7b837a2a34e1df8f960ea9d: And you know what? It was the worst thing that ever happened to us.
textByHash.acd6d712aef06bc7f1db8a027505c5d3c60d6095: I know you've already been investigating Damien Leucurte and his not so secret arrangement with some of Darkmeyer's nobles.
textByHash.b2ffc62abd0b827a794d5bb2835aad82c9bbe16b: Correct. Hallowvale was taken over by my kind, and Lowerniel became ruler of the newly named Morytania.
textByHash.b48cbb629b54ea5079ec4f3064aea26e13abaf02: You're meant to be working with Vertida to make the blisterwood weaponry. Run along now.
textByHash.b49c91222415ac3623af58d0de828344769c7112: Are you ready to deal with my brother?
textByHash.b49f2e853577396473a11d8c32e67c1cf4fa8a7b: A test. Even back then I knew that Lowerniel needed to go. I wanted to see if a partnership with the Myreque was worth exploring.
textByHash.b57e2a43c8fbe7e11439f0e130640cbd298732bb: Well keep your disguise on for a start. You'll want a suitable name as well. Your current one isn't very fitting. If anyone asks, you're called Vampyre.
textByHash.b8320f40617bdfb324258220ea760062a0e48075: Unfortunately for you, you're still no closer to the true prize.
textByHash.b94a4f5867a2a4654a0668ffcf0b6d5190efcad8: Many didn't share that view though, and wanted the war to be over. Ranis was one of them. He managed to infiltrate Efaritay's castle. Once inside, he captured your father, Ascertes.
textByHash.b98116846daa6ec00f402a2a59b66653616e7391: I could, but even today there are many in Darkmeyer who still blindly believe in Lowerniel. It will be much easier for me to take his place if I am not responsible for his demise.
textByHash.ba8137b9470377a94ffc08fd3122b451006814dd: A boat will be your easiest way I imagine. I'll let you worry about the details.
textByHash.bdc01990141251924cadbce7052b24f5a8d1f029: Thank you Veliaf. Now, shall we crack on?
textByHash.bee02813b440eacbd3174f0c3136f3be230f9dc5: We are not the beasts we were back then, but some things do not change. Like I say, it is the vampyre way.
textByHash.bf83bca405f141d5483e189197248d89c39c5695: There's a reason Lowerniel had him banished. I'm just surprised he lasted as long as he did.
textByHash.c0b6bbbad4fb098ede0694a441db155f10e7896f: I take it you know who I am?
textByHash.c1b7d020842d3dbfc75df145694e5e296a37977f: Oh, you could try. Although I doubt it would end well for you.
textByHash.c3e1ca964b25c8f9e664a70669a48d295a4238f4: Finish your story. I promise that everything will be made clear.
textByHash.c5262a2aa25961f79d1f5bf3b3634c9a0a240ec5: I can't control what you believe, but I am not the enemy here.
textByHash.c5a625dc5b5a91f1a22c2b3ad56f1786dc93555c: You're meant to be finding Safalaan. Off you go.
textByHash.c7bd13b2c78c0ec62f65e599b72a50f74b76d7fc: Not bad, but we'll want to make some adjustments. We need you looking less like a vyrewatch and more like a noble.
textByHash.c91ee2a250f52766046a8ce23721688eef520261: Well we can't go any further then. Return once you have it.
textByHash.cb37f0240af0c32964cc9a3aa534d824308f3e8d: Ha! You could try. Even if you were to succeed though, which isn't likely, one of the other vampyre lords or ladies would just take over instead.
textByHash.cf6d6d3f10c0fdd65af527dbcccc1383e1005e7f: He still lives to this day, under a different name of course.
textByHash.d1bce6b17c233a4bcdd9e44e7678257743aa1143: This is growing boringly repetitive, Veliaf. For the last time, if I wanted any of you dead, I'd have done it by now.
textByHash.d28a6b95efd3c7b7a6543e0544c76e56fe3e69f6: Do you not find it odd that you share a name with the former royal family?
textByHash.d2f4ec5c1317d10ea7ce5fd8b442c5cbf19df870: The reason I have gathered you all here is because I have an offer for you.
textByHash.d7dd01c81451292c22248e41b1826bfa313c40e9: Indeed. That is why I have come to you. Only with my help will you have any hope of killing my brother.
textByHash.d898998df292e6660f2e8f8e1d616bab148bd38c: Is there now? Do you refer to the elusive Calsidiu, the apparent leader of the Myreque?
textByHash.d92e2354211f2eb8e3e1a8c8fc67db1f70a4b20a: A secret tunnel, leading directly into Efaritay's castle. The tunnel was here, in this very graveyard. Once they were inside, capturing Ascertes was easy.
textByHash.de086b11999b93a566e9c51ef4075744bbba9211: Your efforts were valiant, Vanstrom. But alas, they were unsuccessful. I decided to take matters into my own hands, using a new tactic.
textByHash.dffd845636f5a6af6e7b43f638aa6bd8fbf3a4b5: Spot on. You know your history. The family of icyene that ruled over Hallowvale were the Hallow family. And so of course, the name of the region is no coincidence.
textByHash.e13954c37a235479ea396169416e80e8515b3833: No. If you want to save your people, my way is the only way.
textByHash.e24c2e459414828ee4b4c5fc12b0fa02123977dc: Once you have the disguise, we will need to scent it. We will discuss that once you have it.
textByHash.e2b1055638ea437cf8640a088a9ebb63443e2c45: Well I'm no scientist, oddly enough. But from what I can tell, even when chopped away, the wood of the tree is very much alive. It shifts and grows in unpredictable ways, rendering our immunities useless.
textByHash.e378335139e5294384d959aee391cac845331ed8: Well it looks like everything is ready.
textByHash.e3bf737004ef4c323c18fb8f9adebbdbe677524e: My kind are struggling to feed themselves. They've currently got bigger worries than cracks in walls.
textByHash.e43843ce37d5d88da33d1d9817d82d17ce79ea01: Once inside, you'll need to chop some logs from the Blisterwood tree. We'll need enough to arm everyone, so eight logs in total.
textByHash.e62a46f40d38f53af5dfa33c8cf8ba11d8726441: Now, did you want something else?
textByHash.e6b635e2c50c393d6f5dc79031d45a0160f96663: As I said to you earlier, Veliaf, if I wanted you dead I'd have done it long ago.
textByHash.e7aa4e96d60aa54b7bcd5f6a98381404a1892a99: Darkmeyer isn't as impenetrable as you might think. I know of a way you can get in. But first, you'll need a disguise.
textByHash.e7f831b348c83c832cd3014982c621c9ecb0d4b7: Now. Time to get these weapons made.
textByHash.e82a78c8b881497cd0c8e1c34468a8858f317f41: During the war, they managed to capture a justiciar, one of Efaritay's most elite warriors. They tortured him for days, until he gave them what they needed.
textByHash.e895120c7c62a06dfd396549947b2f809df12af0: Of course I did. Do you think she would have dared interact with you without my consent? Come now, surely you're smarter than that?
textByHash.e92cffc71fc76c63b787383b27688cbe3ac66337: Exactly. A nice and simple plan.
textByHash.eb5c343219bbba145a9296a5d851a181e39f6904: I'd give her the credit over Ranis. The two of them shared a love for playing with their food rather than eating it. They hatched all kinds of schemes together.
textByHash.eba8bbfbd34f4408092f271d0fc47e748962d3c0: Well I can give you better than guesses. Allow me to offer some clarity.
textByHash.ee99ca6f9562bda916835d5f6d4ac10fb464697d: Ah... that's the tricky bit. I know only of one Blisterwood tree. It lies in Efaritay's old Arboretum, in the middle of Darkmeyer.
textByHash.f156cc30b4b84427386c8b2f599c26d3a1d3f973: Very well. Safalaan, , if you'll please join me.
textByHash.f497d4c49f414202d7bc37eadc95152788018988: I've given your friend Vertida the required information. He will show you what to do.
textByHash.f91591f119ba399088c5f1c48abe1a6eb67b1242: Are you familiar with their areas of research?
textByHash.fa1aaec8b5faa318fb378e13f1be47172f1a6c2d: It was a simple concept. A full night of killing. At dawn, the one with the most kills became the new leader. Lowerniel loved it. He won every time of course. Personally, I prefer our new way of life.
textByHash.fa211c8256bfc4d1aeebe5a9733a5b3eeea5933f: Again with this? I've already told you, I have no need to kill you. Once Lowerniel is gone, I envisage a new age, where my kind and yours live in harmony. I need you alive for that.
textByHash.fc91e9f6ac03e9ebaafb4d9df1539bc5e398ffa0: Now, I assume you have a finished disguise?
textByHash.fd937b995bfded92cd174b85146c4f80895b705f: You've already killed one of my brothers. Now I offer you the chance to kill the other.
